entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose dedicated iOS and Android exchange application launched in January 2023, after a 2019–2022 fund-of-funds business phase, and which added spot trading during the first half of 2024.
entity.notes: BloFin's official milestone timeline separates the 2019–2022 fund-of-funds business from the dedicated exchange application launched in January 2023. The canonical exchange launch is therefore corrected from 2019 to January 2023; January 1 is used as a month-level marker.

expected.summary: Cayman Islands-based centralized exchange launched in 2019 and still operating under the BloFin brand.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose dedicated iOS and Android exchange application launched in January 2023, after a 2019–2022 fund-of-funds business phase, and which added spot trading during the first half of 2024.
changes.notes: BloFin's official milestone timeline separates the 2019–2022 fund-of-funds business from the dedicated exchange application launched in January 2023. The canonical exchange launch is therefore corrected from 2019 to January 2023; January 1 is used as a month-level marker.

events.title: BloFin launched its exchange application in January 2023
events.description: BloFin launched its dedicated centralized-exchange application on iOS and Android in January 2023 and was listed by major exchange-data services.
events.notes: The official sources establish January 2023 but not an exact day, so January 1 is used as a month-level marker.

events.title: BloFin added spot trading during the first half of 2024
events.description: BloFin officially launched spot trading during Q1–Q2 2024, expanding beyond its derivatives-focused exchange offering.
events.notes: January 1 is used as a period-level marker for the official Q1–Q2 2024 milestone.

evidence.title: BloFin About Us and milestones
evidence.notes: The official milestone timeline records the exchange app launch in January 2023 and separately describes the 2019–2022 fund-of-funds phase.

evidence.title: BloFin officially launches the Heart and Hope Network
evidence.notes: The official announcement explicitly describes BloFin as launched in January 2023.

evidence.title: BloFin About Us and milestones
evidence.notes: The official milestone timeline records the spot-trading launch during Q1–Q2 2024.

evidence.title: BloFin official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current spot, derivatives, copy-trading, earn, and related exchange services.
